item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:institution","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"Replace the generic non-membership conditional with a clause encoding that a former member leaves while the body remains the same, and revise the faithful flag until that criterial persistence-through-change meaning is rendered."}
